title: Robata-Grilled, Spicy, Molten Thai Chicken Tom Yum
description: A spicy and refreshing Thai-inspired post-workout dish featuring black treacle, grilled to perfection on a robata grill.

ingredients.name: black treacle
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for desired level of sweetness.

instructions: Prepare the robata grill to medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breast with salt, black pepper, and sugar on both sides.
Grill the chicken breast for 5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat the coconut oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic, galangal, and chili peppers and sauté for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms and fish stock and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the coconut milk and stir to combine.
Add the cooked chicken breast to the wok and stir to combine.
Add the black treacle, fish sauce, lemon juice, and chili flakes (if using) and stir to combine.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the chicken tom yum hot, garnished with coriander leaves, lime wedges, and a sprinkle of chili flakes (if using).
